name: architecture-patterns
description: Language-agnostic software architecture patterns: macro styles (layered, hexagonal, event-driven, microservices), cross-cutting patterns (CQRS, event sourcing, saga, circuit breaker), migration / governance (strangler fig, fitness functions, architecture decision records), and SOLID principles. Grounded in Richards & Ford (*Fundamentals of Software Architecture*), Khononov (*Learning DDD*), Bellemare (*Building Event-Driven Microservices*), Hombergs (*Get Your Hands Dirty on Clean Architecture*), Newman (*Monolith to Microservices*), and Martin (*Clean Architecture*).
